q1_completeness.question: Are all 5 pages fully migrated with no residual duplication?
q1_completeness.answer: Yes — source sweep: all 5 import PersonaPage exactly once; 0 residual DocumentationLayout/buildTechArticleJsonLD imports; 0 residual local jsonLD const; 0 residual .lede CSS rule. Only enterprise retains a <style> block (its single-use .eval-table). The 5x jsonLD boilerplate + 5x .lede duplication is collapsed to 1x each in the component (AC #7 satisfied).

q2_seo_parity.question: Is byte-for-byte SEO parity preserved across all 5 routes, with overrides only where needed?
q2_seo_parity.answer: Yes — built-HTML sweep: all 5 routes carry a TechArticle jsonLD + meta description + a lede element whose data-astro-cid matches the inlined .lede rule. jsonLD-vs-meta divergence is exactly: educators DIFFERS (override), enterprise DIFFERS (override), researchers/startup-first-hour/compliance SAME (no override). The jsonLDDescription override is correctly conditional on a real byte-diff — 2 override pages, 3 non-override pages.

q3_further_extraction.question: Is there any remaining shared pattern worth extracting into a utility/component?
q3_further_extraction.answer:
No. The only remaining cross-page commonality is content-shaped: 4/5 pages end with an

Next Steps

+ , but researchers ends with a Reference section instead — not uniform. A NextSteps component for a 1-line heading + CardGrid that one page does not even use would be over-abstraction (AVOID precedent). The genuine duplication is already eliminated. Evaluation-only disposition: change nothing structurally.

step_3_decide.change_selected: EVALUATION-ONLY — the consolidation is complete and SEO parity holds; no further extraction crosses the over-abstraction bar; no code change this cycle. Record the sweep + line tally + the one content finding (asymmetric enterprise/compliance cross-link) for a future content cycle.
step_3_decide.ceiling_declared: evaluation-only (no structural change); per skill_evaluation_only_disposition (M5.4 cycle 119 precedent)

step_4_implement.implementation_notes: No site files changed. This is a reconciliation/verification cycle. Findings recorded only. Content finding (NOT acted on — out of scope for a render-only refactor per Hard constraint #12): compliance's lede links to /enterprise but enterprise does not link back to /compliance — an asymmetric sibling cross-link to consider in a future content-class cycle, not here.
avoid_precedents_avoided: introducing new content in a render-only refactor

Reconciliation sweep confirms all 5 role pages share <PersonaPage> with zero residual duplication and byte-for-byte SEO parity (override matrix: educators+enterprise override, researchers+startup+compliance none). Line tally: 5 pages 538 -> 457 (-81, -15.1%); +60-line component; 5x jsonLD boilerplate + 5x .lede rule collapsed to 1x. No further extraction crosses the over-abstraction bar (the 4/5 Next-Steps tail is content-shaped, not uniform). One content finding logged (asymmetric enterprise/compliance cross-link) for a future content cycle. S2 (cycles 133-137) complete; S3 (138-140) = visual-language pass + verify + close.
